logger.doc:name: Pre-Query Logger
logger.message: RETRIEVING APPOINTMENT DATA - RecordId: #[payload.data.payload.ChangeEventHeader.recordIds[0]]
TerritoryMapping size: #[sizeOf(vars.TerritoryMapping)], WorkTypeMapping size: #[sizeOf(vars.WorkTypeMapping)], ProviderMapping size: #[sizeOf(vars.ProviderMapping)]

logger.doc:name: Object Store Error Logger
logger.message: Required mapping not found in Object Store. Please ensure mappings are properly loaded. Error: #[error.description]

salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, AdditionalInformation, Service_Resource__c, Provider__c, NextGen_ID__c, ServiceTerritoryId, ContactId, SchedStartTime, SchedEndTime, Status, WorkTypeId, Work_Type_Group__c, Duration, ActualDuration, DurationType FROM ServiceAppointment WHERE Id = ':Id'

logger.doc:name: Log ServiceAppointment Record

logger.message: APPOINTMENT NOT FOUND - RecordId: #[payload.data.payload.ChangeEventHeader.recordIds[0]]
APPOINTMENT RETRIEVED - NextGen ID: #[vars.updateFields[0].NextGen_ID__c default 'Not Set'], Status: #[vars.updateFields[0].Status default 'Unknown']
FAILED TO RETRIEVE APPOINTMENT - Error: #[error.description]

salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, FirstName, LastName, MiddleName, Marital_Status__c, Patient_Gender_2__c, Language_Preferred__c, HF_Chart_Number__c, Email, Phone, MailingCountry, MailingState, MailingPostalCode, MailingCity, MailingStreet, Patient_Ethnicity__c, Patient_Race__c, Patient_Gender__c, Date_of_Birth__c, HealthFusion_Patient_Record_ID__c FROM Contact WHERE Id = ':Id'

logger.doc:name: Log Contact Record

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json var territoryId = vars.updateFields[0].ServiceTerritoryId --- ((vars.TerritoryMapping default []) filter ((item) -> item.Id == territoryId))[0].LOCATION default "Unknown Location"
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- ((vars.ProviderMapping default []) filter ((item) -> item.providerId == vars.updateFields[0].Provider__c))[0].NPI default ""
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- ((vars.ProviderMapping default []) filter ((item) -> item.providerId == vars.updateFields[0].Provider__c))[0].First_Name default ""
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- ((vars.ProviderMapping default []) filter ((item) -> item.providerId == vars.updateFields[0].Provider__c))[0].Last_Name default ""
%dw 2.0 output application/json var workTypeId = vars.updateFields[0].WorkTypeId --- ((vars.WorkTypeMapping default []) filter ((item) -> item.WorkTypeId == workTypeId))[0].NextGenField default ""
%dw 2.0 output application/java var startTime = vars.updateFields[0].SchedStartTime as DateTime --- startTime - |PT5H|
%dw 2.0 output application/java var endTime = vars.updateFields[0].SchedEndTime as DateTime --- endTime - |PT5H|
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- vars.nextGenID != null and vars.nextGenID != ""

%dw 2.0 output application/java --- [ "Cancelled by Patient", "Cancelled by Provider", "Rescheduled by Patient", "Rescheduled by Provider", "No Show" ] contains (vars.updateFields[0].Status default "")

logger.message: HL7 SIU mapping: Create = #[vars.checkConditionAppCreate], Cancel = #[vars.checkConditionAppCancel], Status = #[vars.updateFields[0].Status]

logger.doc:name: Log Provider First/Last Name
Log Mapped HL7 Variables
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { appLocation: vars.appLocation, providerId: vars.providerId, appointmentType: vars.appointmentType, scheduledStartTime: vars.scheduledStartTime, scheduledEndTime: vars.scheduledEndTime, nextGenID: vars.nextGenID, hasNextGenID: vars.hasNextGenID } ]
MISSING REQUIRED MAPPING - Location: #[vars.appLocation], AppointmentType: #[vars.appointmentType], Provider: #[vars.providerId]
MISSING NEXTGEN ID FOR UPDATE - Appointment: #[vars.updateFields[0].Id], Status: #[vars.updateFields[0].Status]

logger.doc:name: Pre-HL7 Transformation
logger.message: PREPARING HL7 MESSAGE - NextGen ID: #[vars.nextGenID default 'Not Set'], Location: #[vars.appLocation], Provider: #[vars.providerId], AppointmentType: #[vars.appointmentType]

logger.doc:name: 1. Appointment Sub-Flow Entry
logger.message: APPOINTMENT SUB-FLOW ENTRY - CorrelationId: #[vars.correlationId default 'NONE'], AppointmentId: #[payload.data.payload.ChangeEventHeader.recordIds[0]], Status: #[payload.data.payload.Status default 'null']

#[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId: vars.correlationId, eventTimestamp: now(), changeEvent: payload.data, ServiceTerritoryId: payload.data.payload.ServiceTerritoryId default null }]
APPOINTMENT VARIABLES - Location: #[vars.appLocation default 'null'], Start: #[vars.scheduledStartTime], End: #[vars.scheduledEndTime]

salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, Email, Username FROM User WHERE Id = ':Id'

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- if ((vars.userEmailVar[0].Email) != null and (vars.userEmailVar[0].Email?)) vars.userEmailVar[0].Email else ("mrudhula.eerisetti@prowesssoft.com")

%dw 2.0 output text/plain
var errorBody = { "Hello": vars.userEmailVar[0].Username, "Message": "This email is to notify you that an error occurred while attempting to " ++ payload.data.payload.ChangeEventHeader.changeType ++ " an Appointment in NextGen.", "Appointment Details": { "Timestamp": now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSXXX"}, "AppointmentID": payload.data.payload.ChangeEventHeader.recordIds[0], "Appointment Status": payload.data.payload.Status default "N/A", "Patient Name": (vars.queryData[0].FirstName default "") ++ " " ++ (vars.queryData[0].LastName default ""), "Date of Birth": vars.queryData[0].Date_of_Birth__c default null, "Provider": (vars.providerFirstName default "") ++ " " ++ (vars.providerLastName default ""), "Appointment Location": vars.appLocation default "N/A" }, "UserID": payload.data.payload.ChangeEventHeader.commitUser default "N/A", "Context": "The system encountered the above error while attempting to " ++ payload.data.payload.ChangeEventHeader.changeType ++ " the following Appointment in NextGen. Please review the details and address the issue." }
--- "Hello: " ++ errorBody.Hello ++ " Message: " ++ errorBody.Message ++ "
Appointment Details: - Timestamp: " ++ (errorBody.'Appointment Details'.Timestamp as String {class: "null"} default "N/A") ++ " - AppointmentID: " ++ (errorBody.'Appointment Details'.AppointmentID as String {class: "null"} default "N/A") ++ " - Appointment Status: " ++ (errorBody.'Appointment Details'.'Appointment Status' as String {class: "null"} default "N/A") ++ " - Patient Name: " ++ (errorBody.'Appointment Details'.'Patient Name' as String {class: "null"} default "N/A") ++ " - Date of Birth: " ++ (errorBody.'Appointment Details'.'Date of Birth' as String {class: "null"} default "N/A") ++ " - Provider: " ++ (errorBody.'Appointment Details'.Provider as String {class: "null"} default "N/A") ++ " - Appointment Location: " ++ (errorBody.'Appointment Details'.'Appointment Location' as String {class: "null"} default "N/A") ++ "
UserID: " ++ (errorBody.UserID as String {class: "null"} default "N/A") ++ " Context: " ++ (errorBody.Context as String {class: "null"} default "N/A")

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- "Appointment " ++ (payload.data.payload.ChangeEventHeader.changeType default "") ++ " Error: " ++ (vars.queryData[0].FirstName default "") ++ " " ++ (vars.queryData[0].LastName default "")

logger.message: id is valid processing HL7 message

#[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { hasMSH: payload contains 'MSH|', hasPID: payload contains 'PID|', hasSCH: payload contains 'SCH|', hasAIL: payload contains 'AIL|', hasAIP: payload contains 'AIP|' }]

#[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { hasMSH: payload contains 'MSH|', hasPID: payload contains 'PID|', hasSCH: payload contains 'SCH|', hasAIL: payload contains 'AIL|', hasAIP: payload contains 'AIP|' }]
"invaild SIU type"

#[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId : vars.correlationId, eventTimestamp : now(), applicationName: Mule::p('app.name'), flowName: flow.name default "implementation-flows", environment: upper(Mule::p('mule.env')), source: Mule::p('source'), target: Mule::p('target'), message: "response sent to viva-sf-ng-outbound-sapi" }]
